purpose: Control which character cards, memories and relationship pairs are loaded depending on current POV and scene participants.
core_rule: Load cards and state for the active POV character and active scene participants only.

do_not: Do not write scene body in first person.
Do not write footer as 'Akira can do'.
Do not write thoughts as 'Akira thinks that'.

load_current_pov: Always load current POV character card.
Always load current POV character memory/state.
Load current POV relevant active relationship pairs only.

akira_not_always_loaded.rule: Akira is not loaded automatically when POV is not Akira and Akira is not present, mentioned, remembered or relevant to the scene goal.
examples: POV Haru alone in the training hall: load Haru, location, current calendar slice, relevant NPC/social rules. Do not load Akira card/state.
POV Haru talking to Raiden about patrols without Akira: load Haru, Raiden, and raiden__haru relationship pair if needed. Do not load Akira.
POV Haru directly talking to Akira: load Haru, Akira, and akira__haru relationship pair.

load_akira_when: Akira is physically present in the scene.
Akira speaks, acts, is addressed, observed or followed.
The scene goal is directly about Akira.
A character is thinking about Akira in a way that affects the scene.
A relationship_pair with Akira is required.
do_not_load_akira_when: Akira is not part of the scene goal.
The scene is about another character's private life, work, conflict or relationship.

load_when: Both participants are active in the scene.
One participant directly talks or thinks about the other.
The scene goal is about this relationship.
Calendar/state marks this pair as relevant for the current beat.
A protected_moment from this pair is directly triggered.
do_not_load_when: Only one participant exists in the broader story but is not relevant now.
Akira is default protagonist but absent.
The pair has no impact on the current scene.
The character is not present, not mentioned and not part of the current goal.

characters_folder_rule: Any character from characters/ is not background NPC.
If a characters/ character appears, load their card, memory and relevant relationships.
Do not use a characters/ character as random crowd filler.
